## Summary

Describe what this pull request changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Security hardening

## Checklist

- [ ] I kept the change focused and reviewable.
- [ ] I added or updated tests where behavior changed.
- [ ] I updated documentation for user-facing changes.
- [ ] I ran `make fmt`, `make vet`, `make test` or equivalent checks.
- [ ] I did not log or expose source tokens, admin API keys, HMAC keys or payload secrets.
- [ ] I did not weaken webhook token validation, admin authorization, delivery retry behavior or SSRF protections.

## Testing notes

Describe how this was tested.

```text
commands:
results:
```

## Screenshots

For Admin UI changes, add screenshots or a short GIF when possible.

## Migration / compatibility notes

Mention any config, database, API or deployment compatibility impact.
